mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 270 in the CPIAUCSL index triggers central bank rate hikes, compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 270.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in residential construction (HOUST) and consumer spending (RSAFS) signals robust demand conditions, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction term between HOUST and RSAFS shows negative coefficient in 20d return regressions (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 0.3% monthly decline in payroll employment (PAYEMS) signals weakening labor markets, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where PAYEMS declines by 0.3% or more.

mechanism_narrative: A 2% monthly increase in industrial production (INDPRO) signals strong supply-side momentum, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for INDPRO in 5d return regressions remains below 0.02 over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly GDP contraction (GDPC1) signals economic slowdown, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 50% of instances where GDPC1 declines.

mechanism_narrative: A 0.5% rise in unemployment (UNRATE) signals labor market slack, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE rises by 0.5% or more.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in housing starts (HOUST) and consumer spending (RSAFS) signals strong demand conditions, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction term between HOUST and RSAFS shows negative coefficient in 20d return regressions (p > 0.05).
